summary: All GDPR features (P0-P2) tested and verified. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI tests passed. P0 Data Export, P1 Invoice PDF, P2 Data Retention, P2 Embed.js Domain Lock all working correctly.
passed_tests: P0: GET /api/user/export returns comprehensive JSON with all required fields
P0: export_info contains exported_at, format_version, gdpr_article (DSGVO reference)
P0: password_hash is excluded from export data
P0: Consent log is created on data export (consent_type: data_export)
P0: Export requires authentication (401)
P1: GET /api/billing/invoice/{transaction_id}/pdf returns valid PDF for paid transactions
P1: PDF has correct %PDF- header and application/pdf content-type
P1: PDF filename contains 'Rechnung' (German invoice)
P1: Returns 400 for non-paid (initiated) transactions
P1: Returns 404 for invalid transaction_id
P1: PDF download requires authentication (401)
P2: POST /api/maintenance/cleanup-expired works and returns deleted_count
P2: Cleanup requires authentication (401)
P2: Background data retention job registered at startup (confirmed in logs)
P2: GET /api/embed.js returns JavaScript with domain lock logic
P2: embed.js contains allowed_domain, domain_verified, window.location.hostname checks
P2: chatbot-public endpoint returns domain_verified and allowed_domain fields
Frontend: Privacy Center page loads with export button
Frontend: Export triggers download and shows 'Art. 20 DSGVO — Data exported successfully.'
Frontend: Billing page shows transaction list with Rechnungen section
Frontend: PDF download button appears ONLY for paid transactions
Frontend: PDF download works (Rechnung-B9F075C8.pdf downloaded)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing paid transaction (pro plan, €79) and initiated transaction (starter plan, €29)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 GDPR features verified: P0 Data Export (Art. 20 DSGVO), P1 Invoice PDF (German tax-compliant with Rechnungsnummer, MwSt, § 14 UStG), P2 Data Retention (background job runs every 24h, manual cleanup via /api/maintenance/cleanup-expired), P2 Embed.js Domain Lock (checks window.location.hostname against allowed_domain). Email sending remains MOCKED. Stripe uses test key.

P1_invoice_pdf.format: German tax-compliant PDF with Rechnungsnummer, Netto/Brutto, 19% MwSt

P2_data_retention.background_job: Runs every 24h, deletes messages older than 90 days
P2_data_retention.handles: Both expires_at and created_at based messages

P2_embed_domain_lock.logic: Checks window.location.hostname against allowed_domain from chatbot-public API
